summary: Studio‑like soundboard capture of a sweet 1980 Vernon show with an intriguing early Supplication Jam.
review: Both reviewers praise the recording’s crystal‑clear, almost studio quality and describe the performance as a sweet, enjoyable set. One reviewer highlights an interesting jam that predates known recordings of the Supplication theme. Overall the show is well‑received and the audio source is considered excellent.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are positive (5 and 4 stars) and comment favorably on sound quality and performance, but only two reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, studio‑like clarity noted; no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or set structure.
